'''βàök-zh-m-y''' ('''kakazhmeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ess|ess]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-m-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ess|ess]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàök-zh-m-y
|-
! Lemma
| kakazhmeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikazhmeyoko|thikazhmeyoko]] || [[word:jikazhmeyoko|jikazhmeyoko]] || [[word:shikazhmeyoko|shikazhmeyoko]] || [[word:kikazhmeyoko|kikazhmeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukazhmeyoko|thuthukazhmeyoko]] || [[word:jujukazhmeyoko|jujukazhmeyoko]] || [[word:shushukazhmeyoko|shushukazhmeyoko]] || [[word:kukukazhmeyoko|kukukazhmeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukazhmeyoko|thukazhmeyoko]] || [[word:jukazhmeyoko|jukazhmeyoko]] || [[word:shukazhmeyoko|shukazhmeyoko]] || [[word:kukazhmeyoko|kukazhmeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukazhmeyoko|thukazhmeyoko]] || [[word:jukazhmeyoko|jukazhmeyoko]] || [[word:shukazhmeyoko|shukazhmeyoko]] || [[word:kukazhmeyoko|kukazhmeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekazhmeyoko|thekazhmeyoko]] || [[word:jekazhmeyoko|jekazhmeyoko]] || [[word:shekazhmeyoko|shekazhmeyoko]] || [[word:kekazhmeyoko|kekazhmeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokazhmeyoko|thothokazhmeyoko]] || [[word:jojokazhmeyoko|jojokazhmeyoko]] || [[word:shoshokazhmeyoko|shoshokazhmeyoko]] || [[word:kokokazhmeyoko|kokokazhmeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokazhmeyoko|thokazhmeyoko]] || [[word:jokazhmeyoko|jokazhmeyoko]] || [[word:shokazhmeyoko|shokazhmeyoko]] || [[word:kokazhmeyoko|kokazhmeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokazhmeyoko|thokazhmeyoko]] || [[word:jokazhmeyoko|jokazhmeyoko]] || [[word:shokazhmeyoko|shokazhmeyoko]] || [[word:kokazhmeyoko|kokazhmeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠkazhmeyoko|thΟΠkazhmeyoko]] || [[word:jΟΠkazhmeyoko|jΟΠkazhmeyoko]] || [[word:shΟΠkazhmeyoko|shΟΠkazhmeyoko]] || [[word:kΟΠkazhmeyoko|kΟΠkazhmeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakazhmeyoko|thathakazhmeyoko]] || [[word:jajakazhmeyoko|jajakazhmeyoko]] || [[word:shashakazhmeyoko|shashakazhmeyoko]] || [[word:kakakazhmeyoko|kakakazhmeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakazhmeyoko|thakazhmeyoko]] || [[word:jakazhmeyoko|jakazhmeyoko]] || [[word:shakazhmeyoko|shakazhmeyoko]] || [[word:kakazhmeyoko|kakazhmeyoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakazhmeyithi|shakazhmeyithi]] || [[word:shakazhmeyiji|shakazhmeyiji]] || [[word:shakazhmeyishi|shakazhmeyishi]] || [[word:shakazhmeyiki|shakazhmeyiki]]
